name: Distribuidora de Gas Cuyana S.A.
summary: Distribuidora de Gas Cuyana S.A. distributes natural gas in the C√É¬≥rdoba, Mendoza, La Rioja, San Luis, Catamarca, and San Juan provinces of Argentina. It serves approximately 1,283,095 customers, including residential and commercial customers in 268 locations through a distribution network of 30,939 km. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Buenos Aires, Argentina.
